title: clerodendrum floribundum var. coriaceum
intro: Clerodendrum floribundum var. coriaceum is a variety of flowering plant in the Clerodendrum genus, commonly known as the glory bower. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Clerodendrum floribundum var. coriaceum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and infusion, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
